title: Spark PvP Toggle
description: Instantly toggle PvP ON/OFF using /pvp on & /pvp off without restarting the server.
body:
## ✨ Sparky PvP Control

Sparky PvP Control is a lightweight and modern Paper 1.21.10 plugin that lets server admins toggle PvP ON or OFF instantly, without needing to restart or reload the server. Ideal for SMP servers, PvP events, peaceful gameplay, and mini-games.

## 🚀 Features
● Toggle PvP in real time (/pvp on / /pvp off)

● Works instantly without restart

● Blocks all forms of PvP damage when disabled (melee, projectiles, potions, explosions)

● Automatically saves PvP state and restores it after restart

● Lightweight and performance-friendly

● Includes permission support for admin-only control

## 📦 Commands
/pvp on — Enable PvP
![PvP On](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a13bb7a1d3cb52002480b63cb7bbd1a055a789f4.png)

/pvp off — Disable PvP
![PvP Off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/829a2a6860cae0526b38c687a96920461f90a069.png)

## 🎯 Perfect For
● SMP / survival servers

● Events & tournaments

● Peaceful or non-PvP servers

● Custom mini-games

## 📥 Installation
Drop the plugin .jar into your plugins folder and start the server — done ✔

## 💬 Support
Report issues or suggest new features anytime.
⭐ Like the plugin? Leave a review to support future updates!
